title: chromatotriccum coelandria
intro: Chromatotriccum coelandria, also known as Wild Peach or Wild Peach Tree, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, known for its beautiful white or pink flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Chromatotriccum coelandria include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds. Chromatotriccum coelandria can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
